untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparing candle pattern height (highest high to lowest low divided by breakout price) against a median threshold from Table 3.3. This ratio calculation and table-based comparison logic cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. The signal also lacks explicit exit conditions (marked AUTHOR_SILENT) and does not provide the median threshold value needed for the comparison.
translation_notes: The core pattern measurement (pattern_height / breakout_price vs median) requires custom calculation logic not available in standard indicator set. Direction is context-dependent (upbreakout vs downbreakout), but the backtest engine requires explicit LONG/SHORT direction. Entry uses tall candle proxy (range > 2%), exit uses reversal logic as author provided no exit guidance.
